serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (2 × 30,000 km CBS ceiling = 60,000 km) per garage.wiki F30 schedule.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 30,000 km: N20/N26 schedule — spark plugs at every engine oil service (garage.wiki F30).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: CBS wear monitoring; 30,000 km inspection cadence.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: CBS wear monitoring; 30,000 km inspection cadence.
serviceNotes.timing chain inspection: N20 timing chain assemblies are a known wear area; many specialists recommend listening for rattle and inspection around 100,000 km (workshop REC, not an OEM fixed interval).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual F30
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 30,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — N20 B20 A at every engine oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval (pre-LCI F30)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval (pre-LCI F30)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
